W H AT D O E S I T TA K E
T O S U C C E E D
Reasons aren’t going to get you to where you want to go, results come
from an obsession with getting yourself to TAKE ACTION…
How many people do you know that know what to do but don’t do what
they know… Decide up front, why you’re doing this.
Massive Action + Certainty + Effective Execution = Cure All
Get rewarded in public what you practice in private.
POTENTIAL
You can use this worksheet specifically to follow along with the “What Does
It Take To Succeed” training video.

RESULTS	BELIEF/CERTAINTY
